tweets.text: Thanks to Chairman Crawford for calling this important hearing to talk about the counterintelligence threats facing our states and how organizations like the National Fusion Center network must extend beyond the terrorism threats that catalyzed their creation in the years following the 9/11 attacks. tweets.text: RT @FinancialCmte: WATCH: @RepFitzgerald on restoring legal clarity and procedural fairness at the CFPB: "I think my concern moving forward is that restoring legal clarity and procedural fairness means not only defining the CFPB's authorities more clearly, it also means making sure that they are within the proper jurisdiction. I have a bill, the Restoring Court Authority Over Litigation Act, which reflects those principles by clarifying that the conduct of attorneys in litigation is regulated by the courts and not the CFPB." 📺⬇️

tweets.text: RT @FinancialCmte: WATCH: @USRepMikeFlood on reining in the CFPB's regulatory overreach: "I had a lot of disagreements with your predecessor, Director Chopra. Among them was Director Chopra's tendency to expand the CFPB's jurisdictional reach at every turn. For example, the CFPB issued a rulemaking in late 2024 defining digital consumer payment technology entities as 'larger participants' and, therefore, subject to CFPB supervision. I led a Congressional Review Act resolution overturning that move, and I'm proud to say that it was signed by President Trump into law in May 2025." 📺⬇️
